name: nostream-multicast-poc
description: Summer of Bitcoin 2026 · Nostream · Project 1 (Local-First Sync & Performance Engine) — Competency Test. Standalone Node.js dgram multicast PoC that broadcasts a dummy Nostr event on 239.19.88.1:9797 with Notedeck-compatible `u32 BE length || UTF-8 JSON` framing and verifies self-loopback.
author: Aryan Gautam <archief117@gmail.com> (https://github.com/archief2910)

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run selftest && npm run loopback
